summary: Create a copy of the Action Plan Section in the Action Plan of the Section.
description:
Create a copy of the Action Plan Section in the Action Plan of the Section.

**View Parameter:**
- `normal` (default): Returns standard Action Plan Section attributes
- `extended`: Returns standard attributes plus nested `plan_items` array

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
Specifies which view (which attributes) of the Action Plan Section is going to be present in the response.
- `normal` (default): Returns standard Action Plan Section attributes
- `extended`: Return...

plan_section_id.description: ID of the Action Plan Section to copy from.
